notes: Medic Mobile / Community Health Toolkit is backed by CouchDB; there is no single vendor OpenAPI spec. Authored a focused OpenAPI 3.0.3 from the CouchDB changes-feed docs, the Medic DB schema, and the adaptor source. Covers the operations the adaptor actually performs: GET /{db}/_changes (confirmed base pattern `${server}/${db}/_changes` in src/Adaptor.js), fetching a document, and POSTing extracted submissions to an inbox endpoint (postUrl). Report/doc shape is a representative Medic data_record. Server URL is a CouchDB default placeholder.
